Lore Coverage

Counts are published only when they can be reconciled. Unknown totals remain unknown instead of being guessed.

Structured record status

source reviewed47

The Division 2 Lore Coverage

Expected totals remain intentionally unknown until the in-game menus and release-by-release source inventory are captured and reconciled.

Last audited 2026-07-19. Unknown totals are deliberately not estimated.

CategoryExpectedCapturedSource reviewedHuman reviewedPublishedStatus
Lore-bearing collectiblesUnknown0000inventory pendingCategory and set totals will be added only after direct in-game inventory evidence is available.
PeopleUnknown121200in progressTwelve core people now have source-reviewed overview records across the outbreak, campaign and early Episodes; no completeness claim has been made.
Factions and organizationsUnknown101000in progressEight factions, SHD and the JTF now have source-reviewed overview records; leadership and subgroup coverage remains incomplete.
LocationsUnknown101000in progressTen major locations in The Division 2's narrative and its first-game context have overview records; district and landmark coverage remains incomplete.
Missions and eventsUnknown121200in progressFive core events form a sourced relative timeline and seven Episode/stronghold missions have overview records; base-campaign and later seasonal mission coverage remains incomplete.
Diseases and conceptsUnknown1100in progressGreen Poison has a foundational overview; antiviral, variants and technical concepts remain separate future records.

Unofficial, source-led research into The Division universe and its real-world influences.

Lore Archive / Methodology / Corrections / YouTube @raigulus
